---
title: "socialNavigationAnalysis"
author: "Neel"
date: "2026-05-24"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
setwd("C:/Users/mcpro/OneDrive/Documents/WAVE LAB/Code/socialNavigation/tools")

library(tidyverse)
library(paletteer)
```

```{r}
all_data <- read.csv("data/dataframe_answer.csv", header=TRUE)

#delete all test data

all_data <- all_data |>
  filter(participant_id != "{{%PROLIFIC_PID%}}") |>
  filter(!str_detect(participant_id, "no_query_worker"))

length(unique(all_data$participant_id))

uniq <- unique(all_data$participant_id)
uniq

length(uniq)
```


```{r}


short_data <- all_data |>
  select(participant_id, response, response_time, accuracy, trial_rotation, stripe_angle_top, stripe_angle_bottom, background_group, identical)

df_gb_pid <- short_data |>
  group_by(participant_id) |>
  summarize(num_trials = n(),
            meanRT = mean(response_time),
            sdRT = sd(response_time))
#note: we didn't filter out people who didn't do enough trials here




grand_meanRT <- mean(df_gb_pid$meanRT)
grand_sdRT <- sd(df_gb_pid$meanRT)

sd_threshold <- 2.0

upper_bound <- grand_meanRT + sd_threshold * grand_sdRT
lower_bound <- grand_meanRT - sd_threshold * grand_sdRT

df_gb_pid <- df_gb_pid |>
  filter(num_trials > 45) |> ## change num as needed
  filter(meanRT < upper_bound & meanRT > lower_bound)


good_participants <- df_gb_pid$participant_id

#nrow(all_data) - nrow(short_data) #num rows removed
```

```{r}
#excludes individual trials that are X sd from a given participant's mean RT

raw_good_data <- short_data |>
  filter(participant_id %in% good_participants) 
# 
# middle_df <- df_gb_pid |>
#   select(participant_id, meanRT)
  
individual_trial_sd_threshold <- 2

fused_ind_exclude <- left_join(raw_good_data, df_gb_pid,
              by = "participant_id") |>
  filter(response_time > meanRT - individual_trial_sd_threshold * sdRT & response_time < meanRT + individual_trial_sd_threshold * sdRT)


  



```



```{r}
real_bar_data <- short_data |>
  filter(accuracy == 1) |>
  group_by(background_group) |>
  summarize(
    mean = mean(response_time),
    sd = sd(response_time),
    n = n(),
    se = sd/sqrt(n)
  )


ggplot(real_bar_data, aes(x=background_group, y=mean, fill=background_group)) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin= mean - se, ymax = mean + se)) + 
  labs(title = "Task Reaction Times", x = "Condition", y = "Reaction time, ms")

```
```{r}

grouped_data <- short_data |>
  filter(accuracy == 1) |>
  group_by(participant_id, background_group) |>
  summarize(mean_rt = mean(response_time), mean_acc = mean(accuracy), total_trials = n()) |>
  ungroup()


grouped_data$background_group = as.factor(grouped_data$background_group)

diff_groups_anova <- aov(mean_rt ~ background_group + Error(participant_id/background_group), data=grouped_data)

summary(diff_groups_anova)

library(emmeans)
post_hoc <- emmeans(diff_groups_anova, ~background_group)

pairs(post_hoc, adjust = "tukey")

```
```{r}
library(afex)

rm_anova <- aov_ez(id = "participant_id", 
                   dv = "mean_rt", 
                   data = grouped_data, 
                   within = "background_group")

summary(rm_anova)

```

```{r}
acc_data <- all_data |>
  group_by(background_group) |>
  summarize(
    mean = mean(accuracy),
    sd = sd(accuracy),
    n = n(),
    se = sd/sqrt(n)
  )





ggplot(acc_data, aes(x=background_group, y=mean, fill=background_group)) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin= mean - se, ymax = mean + se)) +
  labs(title = "Stripe Angle Match Accuracy", x="Condition", y= "Accuracy")


grouped_data_acc <- all_data |>
  group_by(participant_id, background_group) |>
  summarize(mean_rt = mean(response_time), mean_acc = mean(accuracy)) |>
  ungroup()


grouped_data_acc$background_group = as.factor(grouped_data_acc$background_group)




acc_anova <- aov_ez(id = "participant_id", 
                   dv = "mean_acc", 
                   data = grouped_data_acc, 
                   within = "background_group")

summary(acc_anova)

library(emmeans)

acc_hoc <- emmeans(acc_anova, ~background_group)

pairs(acc_hoc, adjust = "tukey")



```

```{r}
short_data$trial_rotation = as.factor(short_data$trial_rotation)

short_data |>
  group_by(trial_rotation) |>
  summarize(count = n())

```
